caption:
A solar installer we work with was drowning in enquiries — and losing most of them.

Solar's a slow sell: lots of 'just looking', a few real buyers, and by the time he called back they'd booked a survey with whoever replied first. So we put a speed-to-lead system on his enquiries — instant reply, answers the basics, books the serious ones for a survey.

The hot leads get booked while they're still warm. He stopped losing high-value installs to whoever rang back first.

Losing big-ticket quotes to slow follow-up? Free audit — link in bio. 👇

#solar #solarinstaller #renewables #tradesbusiness #ukandireland
